description: The first CLI for Shopper — every catalog, cart, and delivery surface plus a local price/basket history the web app throws away each cycle.

tools.name: address_list_address
tools.description: GET /address/. Returns the address.

tools.name: cart_add
tools.description: Add a product to the cart or increase its quantity. Required: id, quantity. Optional: engine. Returns the new cart.

tools.name: cart_list_summary
tools.description: GET /cart/summary. Returns the summary.

tools.name: cart_remove
tools.description: Remove a product from the cart or decrease its quantity. Required: id, quantity. Returns the new cart.

params.name: quantity
params.description: Quantity to remove (decrements; full qty removes the line)

tools.name: catalog_create_count
tools.description: POST /catalog/search/count. Required: brands, metadata, types. Optional: query. Returns the new count.

tools.name: catalog_create_filters
tools.description: POST /catalog/search/filters. Required: brands, metadata, types. Optional: query. Returns the new filters.

tools.name: catalog_create_search
tools.description: POST /catalog/search. Required: brands, metadata, types. Optional: page, query, size. Returns the new search.

tools.name: catalog_get_view
tools.description: GET /catalog/banners/{banner_id}/view. Required: banner_id. Returns the view.

tools.name: catalog_list_banners
tools.description: GET /catalog/banners. Optional: imageSize. Returns the banners.

tools.name: catalog_list_departments
tools.description: GET /catalog/departments. Returns the departments.

tools.name: catalog_list_news
tools.description: GET /catalog/products/news. Returns the news.

tools.name: catalog_list_suggest
tools.description: GET /catalog/search/suggest. Optional: query. Returns the suggest.

tools.name: delivery_list_calendar
tools.description: GET /delivery/v2/calendar. Returns the calendar.

tools.name: delivery_list_summary
tools.description: GET /delivery/summary. Returns the summary.

tools.name: features_create_select
tools.description: POST /features/stores/select. Required: store_id. Returns the new select.

tools.name: features_create_start
tools.description: POST /features/timer/start. Required: name. Returns the new start.

tools.name: features_create_view
tools.description: POST /features/toggle/view. Required: toggle. Returns the new view.

tools.name: features_list_stores
tools.description: GET /features/stores. Optional: toggles. Returns the stores.

tools.name: features_list_tick
tools.description: GET /features/timer/tick. Returns the tick.

tools.name: features_list_toggle
tools.description: GET /features/toggle. Returns the toggle.

tools.name: session_list_social
tools.description: GET /auth/validation/social. Returns the social.
